headline: General Dynamics Board Declares Dividend
summary: General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) announced today that its board of directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.59 per share on the company's common stock, payable August 7, 2026, to shareholders of record on July 2, 2026.

headline: General Dynamics Stock: Is GD Underperforming the Industrial Sector?
summary: While General Dynamics has underperformed its sector peers recently, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
